Liao Chun е»–ж·і
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liao Chun (е»–ж·і). Served at Yiling, Jiang Wan recommended him for rank. Liao Chun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
